ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size category */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size category (e.g., 3XS, 2XS, XS, S, M) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size category */,
  "size_category" TEXT /* Category of the size (e.g., tops, bottoms, dresses, outerwear) */,
  "size_group" TEXT /* Group of the size (e.g., petite, plus, maternity) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement type */,
  "measurement_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement type (e.g., Shoulder, Chest, Waist, Sleeve) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement type */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the measurement (e.g., cm, inches) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_measurements" (
  "size_measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size measurement */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size category */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement type */,
  "value" REAL /* Measurement value in cm */,
  "tolerance" REAL /* Tolerance for the measurement (e.g., +/- 1cm) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_measurements_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of product (e.g., top, bottom, dress, outerwear) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "style" TEXT /* Style of the product (e.g., casual, formal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product size */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size category */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the product in this size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, product manager, customer service) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., design, product management, customer service) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the product */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being ordered */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user placing the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
